# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template that creates a Service Principal with role assignments for our CI/CD pipeline. Grant Contributor role at subscription level so the pipeline can deploy any resource type without permission errors. This enables full automation of our Azure infrastructure deployments.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "servicePrincipalAppId": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "The application (client) ID of the existing service principal."
      }
    },
    "servicePrincipalObjectId": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "The object ID of the service principal."
      }
    },
    "roleDefinitionId": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "b24988ac-6180-42a0-ab88-20f7382dd24c",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "The role definition ID for the built-in Contributor role."
      }
    },
    "roleAssignmentNameGuid": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[newGuid()]",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "GUID for the role assignment resource name."
      }
    }
  },
  "variables": {
    "subscriptionId": "[subscription().subscriptionId]"
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments",
      "apiVersion": "2022-04-01",
      "name": "[parameters('roleAssignmentNameGuid')]",
      "scope": "[subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Resources/subscriptions', variables('subscriptionId'))]",
      "properties": {
        "roleDefinitionId": "[subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', parameters('roleDefinitionId'))]",
        "principalId": "[parameters('servicePrincipalObjectId')]",
        "principalType": "ServicePrincipal"
      }
    }
  ],
  "outputs": {
    "servicePrincipalAppId": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[parameters('servicePrincipalAppId')]"
    },
    "servicePrincipalObjectId": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[parameters('servicePrincipalObjectId')]"
    },
    "roleAssignmentId": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments', parameters('roleAssignmentNameGuid'))]"
    }
  }
}
